source_note: Official IRS ATS scenario 12 covers engine-supported Form 1040 line 15 subtraction and line 16 ordinary regular tax. Schedule C, Schedule SE, Schedule 1 adjustments, other taxes, payments, and amount owed are outside the current U.S. engine scope.

line_16_exclusion_reason: Official ATS draft line 16 shows 162, but current IRS 2025 Form 1040 instructions Tax Table row 1600 to 1625 for married filing jointly shows 161. The executable current-law oracle therefore covers line 15 only and records line 16 as excluded.
source_note: Official IRS ATS scenario 13 covers engine-supported Form 1040 line 15 subtraction. Nonrefundable credits and downstream refund lines are outside the current U.S. engine scope.
